channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Ce TV Philips Ambilight (4K, TitanOS) de 65 pouces éteint 26 % de son prix pendant les Ventes Flash d’Amazon
item.description: Avec les Ventes Flash d'Amazon, le Philips Ambilight 65PUS8200 devient un TV avec un excellent rapport qualité-prix grâce à cette remise de 180 euros.

item.title: U.S. military contractor likely built iPhone hacking tools used by Russian spies in Ukraine
item.description: Google found a series of hacking tools they said were used by a Russian espionage group and a cybercriminal group in China. Sources from a U.S. government defense contractor said some of those hacking tools were theirs.

item.title: Why Are Pro-Iran Bots Pushing AI Fakes of Epstein and Trump When There’s Real Material?
item.description: One popular video also features Elon Musk and Bill Gates.

item.title: Get wired in Amazon's Spring Sale: audiophile IEMs, portable hi-res players and more at lowest ever prices
item.description: Amazon's Spring Deal Days are here and I've picked out the best portable hi-fi deals live now, with some lowest-seen prices across audiophile products — enjoy!

item.title: Slay the Spire II is even better with a friend
item.description: Slay the Spire II launched in early access last week, and it's already an excellent sequel to one of the best roguelikes of all time. In many ways, it's very similar to its predecessor. Like Hades II and Hollow Knight: Silksong, Slay the Spire II mostly iterates on an already superb foundation. But it does […]

item.title: Test du Narwal V40 Station : l’aspirateur balais ultime pour les flemmards
item.description: La poussière vous dégoûte ? Vider un bac vous donne des boutons ? Narwal a peut-être la solution ultime. Le Narwal V40 Station ? Il vous promet d'offrir une puissance monstrueuse, deux batteries de série, et surtout une station d'accueil massive qui aspire la saleté à votre place.

item.title: Nouvelle enceinte Sonos Era 100 SL, quelles différences avec la Era 100 ?
item.description: En plus de sa nouvelle enceinte Sonos Play, la marque propose aussi une nouvelle enceinte Bluetooth qui se veut à la fois indépendante, mais qui peut également servir de module surround pour un home cinéma complet.

item.title: I can't run my D&D games without this list of gadgets, books and other essentials — and as luck would have it, they're all on sale at Amazon right now
item.description: 10 essentials I use all the time as a DM (and they're all on sale at Amazon).

item.title: How to watch Viki from anywhere – stream K-drama with a VPN
item.description: The spiritual successor to DramaFever is a streaming service that caters to fans of Asian films and TV. Here's how to watch Viki from anywhere with a VPN.

item.title: Crimson Desert will have three graphics modes across PlayStation and Xbox, including a performance one that boasts an upscaled 4K resolution at 60fps with ray tracing on PS5 Pro
item.description: Pearl Abyss has finally revealed the PC and console specifications for Crimson Desert ahead of the game's launch this month.

item.title: Mark Zuckerberg Decides Meta Needs More Slop, Buys the Social Network for AI Agents
item.description: Because Facbook and Instagram don't have enough bots, apparently.

item.title: Andy Muschietti Assures Fans That ‘It: Welcome to Derry’ Will Return
item.description: HBO still hasn't made an official announcement, but the co-creator of the Stephen King show sounds awfully excited for more Pennywise.

item.title: Gemini chamboule tout dans Google Docs, Sheets, Drive et Slides (mais pas pour tout le monde)
item.description: Google met le paquet avec Gemini pour que l'IA transforme votre manière de travailler dans Workspace (Drive, Docs, Slides, Sheets). Mais tout le monde n'y a pas droit.

item.title: Finally some good news for RAM buyers — Corsair’s 32GB Vengeance DDR5-6000 kit is £126 off right now at Amazon
item.description: Save nearly 25% on the 32GB Corsair Vengeance DDR5-6000 kit right now, a rare win for RAM buyers.

item.title: How to watch Vanishing Act — stream FEDS season 2 episode 2 online from anywhere
item.description: Here’s how to watch FEDS season 2 episode 2 Vanishing Act online from anywhere.

item.title: HPE says it can change the terms (and price) of your contract depending on global hardware changes - is it just 'protecting its margins'?
item.description: HPE is moving to agile pricing and shorter quote commitment cycles due to rising DRAM and NAND prices.

item.title: Meilleur vélo électrique (VAE) : quel modèle choisir en 2026 ?
item.description: Difficile de s'y retrouver dans la jungle des vélos électriques (VAE). Pour vous aider à choisir celui qu'il vous faut, nous avons testé et sélectionné les meilleurs vélos électriques du marché.

item.title: Ce laptop gaming MSI avec Ultra 7, RTX 5070 Ti et écran 240 Hz a droit à une remise de 34 % pendant les ventes flash d’Amazon
item.description: Écran très fluide, processeur puissant, carte graphique récente... Le MSI Vector 16 HX AI A2XW a tout pour satisfaire les gamers pointilleux en quête d'une machine rapide et réactive. Ce PC portable gamer bénéficie en plus d'une belle réduction pendant les ventes flash de printemps d'Amazon : on le trouve ainsi à 1 659 euros au lieu de 2 499 euros. ...

item.title: How to watch Newcastle vs Barcelona: Free Streams, TV Channels & Preview for Champions League 2025/26 Round of 16 1st leg
item.description: All the ways to watch Newcastle vs Barcelona live streams from anywhere and for free, as St. James' Park hosts the Champions League Round of 16 1st leg.

item.title: ChatGPT will now generate interactive visuals to help you with math and science concepts
item.description: OpenAI is rolling out new interactive responses in ChatGPT it says are designed to make the chatbot more useful for learners. Starting today, ChatGPT will generate dynamic visuals when you ask it to explain select scientific and mathematical concepts, including the Pythagorean theorem, Coulomb's law and lens equations. When ChatGPT responds with an interactive visual, you'll be able to tweak any variables and the equation itself, allowing you to see how those changes affect the solution. With today's release, OpenAI says ChatGPT will respond with interactive visuals when asked about more than ...

item.title: Anthropic and OpenAI just exposed SAST's structural blind spot with free tools
item.description: OpenAI launched Codex Security on March 6, entering the application security market that Anthropic had disrupted 14 days earlier with Claude Code Security. Both scanners use LLM reasoning instead of pattern matching. Both proved that traditional static application security testing (SAST) tools are structurally blind to entire vulnerability classes. The enterprise security stack is caught in the middle.Anthropic and OpenAI independently released reasoning-based vulnerability scanners, and both found bug classes that pattern-matching SAST was never designed to detect. The competitive pressure be...

item.title: OpenAI upgrades ChatGPT with interactive learning tools as lawsuits and Pentagon backlash mount
item.description: OpenAI on Monday launched a set of interactive visual tools inside ChatGPT that let users manipulate mathematical and scientific formulas in real time — a genuinely impressive education feature that also serves as the company's most direct attempt yet to change the subject during the worst ten days of its corporate life.The new experience covers more than 70 core math and science concepts, from the Pythagorean theorem to Ohm's law to compound interest. When a user asks ChatGPT to explain one of these topics, the chatbot now generates a dynamic module with adjustable sliders alongside its writt...

item.title: The TSA website has a warning travelers should know about right now
item.description: About 50,000 TSA screeners are working without pay during the shutdown, leading to staffing shortages and massive security delays at some airports. If you’re traveling soon, some grueling wait times at the airport may be in your future thanks to a partial government shutdown. But to make matters even more complicated, the Transportation Security Administration (TSA) is not currently updating its sites during the partial shutdown, meaning fliers can’t easily check TSA wait times before heading to the airport....

item.title: Air taxis move closer to reality as DOT approves eVTOL pilot programs in 26 states
item.description: Companies including Joby, Archer, and Beta will begin real-world testing of electric air taxis under new U.S. Department of Transportation pilots designed to help regulators integrate flying cars into American airspace. The U.S. Department of Transportation has approved eight pilot programs across 26 states that will allow eVTOL (electric vertical takeoff and landing) aircraft to begin real-world testing. The program will permit air taxi service in select cities, while data collected from participating companies will help the FAA develop regulations to scale the technology while keeping urban ...

item.title: U.S. homes sales increase in February amid easing mortgage rates
item.description: Home prices continued to rise last month, albeit more slowly. Sales of previously occupied U.S. homes picked up in February from the previous month as home shoppers took advantage of easing mortgage rates and a modest increase in properties on the market heading into the spring homebuying season.

item.title: « Je l’ai conduit et c’est vraiment impressionnant » : la Porsche 718 électrique va bien voir le jour
item.description: Le successeur électrique des 718 Boxster et Cayman semble bien toujours en vie. Mais entre les déboires industriels accumulés et les doutes persistants autour de l'électrique et des voitures de sport, Porsche aurait sans doute préféré une autre conjoncture pour lancer sa vraie première sportive électrique.

item.title: Apple’s MacBook Neo has some of the cheapest AppleCare+ fees — but is the add-on worth it? Here’s our verdict
item.description: The MacBook Neo’s AppleCare+ repair costs are lower than any other Mac.

item.title: Yoshi and the Mysterious Book will be released for Switch 2 on May 21
item.description:
Nintendo's next platform adventure, Yoshi and the Mysterious Book, will be released for Switch 2 on May 21. The company announced the release date as part of its annual Mar10 Day celebration. This is a made-up holiday that exists because the date spelled out like that sort of looks like the word Mario.
In any event, there's a new trailer for the perpetually hungry dinosaur's latest adventure. It looks super cute. It sort of resembles a children's picture book come to life. Yoshi games typically boast unique graphical styles, with past entries featuring entire worlds made of yarn, cardboard an...

item.title: Fake AI Content About the Iran War Is All Over X
item.description: X’s Grok is failing to accurately verify video footage from the Iran conflict and is sharing its own AI-generated images about the war.

item.title: How to watch The Contenders '26 online for FREE from anywhere
item.description: Here's our guide on how to watch The Contenders '26 for FREE on TVNZ+ from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Boost your PC storage with Crucial's 4TB P310 Gen4 NVMe SSD - get speeds up to 7100MB/s for under £300 in Amazon’s Spring Deal Days sale
item.description: Crucial’s 4TB P310 PCIe Gen 4 NVMe SSD delivers up to 7,100MB/s read speeds and is 17% off at Amazon for Spring Deal Days.

item.title: Aspirateurs robots ou balais : le meilleur de Dreame est à prix réduit pour quelques jours [Sponso]
item.description: Pour célébrer l’arrivée du printemps, et le grand ménage qui l’accompagne bien souvent, Dreame baisse le prix d’une bonne partie de son catalogue. L’occasion de s’équiper du meilleur de la technologie ménagère (et plus encore) sans se ruiner.

item.title: A 1,300-Pound NASA Probe Will Make an Uncontrolled Plunge Through Earth’s Atmosphere Today
item.description: The risk of spacecraft debris injuring someone on Earth is 1 in 4,200.

item.title: Pershing Square IPO: Billionaire Bill Ackman’s hedge fund plans dual stock listing on the NYSE
item.description: The hedge fund owns shares in several notable companies, including Alphabet, Meta, Uber, and Chipotle, according to an S-1 filing with the SEC. Billionaire investor Bill Ackman is planning to take his Pershing Square management company (PS) public.

item.title: Google killed its dark web scanner, but NordVPN’s upgraded tool is here to track your leaked data
item.description: NordVPN has upgraded its dark web monitoring tools to fill the gap left by Google. Here’s how the new Dark Web Monitor Pro scans for your most sensitive data and keeps your identity safe.

item.title: 'An incredible deal': Grab a 1000GB monthly preloaded 5G data SIM valid till November 2027 for just £68 thanks to Three and Vodafone
item.description: Pay less than £3 per month till November 2027 and get 5G connectivity on the cheap.

item.title: Sonos lance la Play, une enceinte hybride Bluetooth et Wi-Fi avec une autonomie de 24 heures
item.description: Sonos sort enfin la tête de l'eau. Après une année 2025 marquée par les déboires de son application, le constructeur américain revient à ce qu'il sait faire de mieux : du matériel. La Sonos Play débarque pour boucher le trou entre la petite Roam et la massive Move.

item.title: See the 163 new emoji available in iOS 26.4 beta 4
item.description: There are lots of new emoji to explore in Apple's latest iOS beta.

item.title: L’Insta360 X4 Air s’allège de 20 % de son prix chez Amazon pendant les Ventes Flash
item.description: Entre la X4 et la X5 se trouve l'Insta360 X4 Air. Une action cam qui mêle légèreté et qualité dans une offre à 349 euros pendant les Ventes Flash d'Amazon.

item.title: Epic Games claims the cost of running games 'has gone up a lot' as it hikes V-Buck prices
item.description: Epic Games has announced that it will be raising the prices of Fortnite's V-Bucks this month.

item.title: Philips Hue lights have hit record-low prices in Amazon's spring sale — and I've picked the 12 best deals
item.description: If you've been thinking about switching to smart lights, or want to extend your existing Hue setup, this is the time.

item.title: Celebrate Mar10 day with these Nintendo Lego deals at Amazon
item.description: In honor of Mar10 Day, Amazon has tons of Mario Lego sets on sale for uo to 40% off.

item.title: Don't want to pay for a video doorbell subscription? Here are 3 Ring alternatives I recommend in Amazon's Spring Sale
item.description: Don't pay to keep your video doorbell running, these 3 subscription-free alternatives are the ones to score on Amazon right now.

item.title: Australia's 'Swiss cheese-like age verification' may lead to a VPN ban — and the whole country's digital safety is on the line
item.description: Australia's longest-running digital rights group, Electronic Frontiers Australia, warns that "extraordinary privacy, security, and online safety risks" will arise if access to VPNs is restricted.

item.title: Google to Provide Pentagon with Gemini-powered AI agents
item.description: Google is rolling out Gemini AI agents to the Department of Defense's more than 3 million civilian and military employees, according to Bloomberg. The agents will initially operate on unclassified networks, with talks underway to expand them to classified and top-secret systems, according to Emil Michael, the Under Secretary of Defense for Research and Engineering. Eight pre-built agents will automate tasks like summarizing meeting notes, building budgets and checking proposed actions against the national defense strategy. Google Vice President Jim Kelly said in a blog post on Tuesday that Def...

item.title: ‘Half the size, twice the clean’ — iRobot promises its new Roomba Mini packs a punch despite being its ‘smallest Roomba robot ever’
item.description: The Roomba Mini is half the size of other Roombas, and according to iRobot it’s perfect for cleaning smaller homes.

item.title: The $150 oil shock might be exactly what our future needs
item.description: A crisis in the Strait of Hormuz is terrifying. But what if expensive oil isn’t a bug in the transition to a green, knowledge-based economy, but a feature? The oil markets are rattled. Iran’s closure of the Strait of Hormuz—through which a fifth of the world’s oil flows—have sent prices toward $90 a barrel, with Qatar’s energy minister warning they could hit $150 within weeks. Energy analysts are invoking “the mother of all disaster scenarios.” Commentators are drawing comparisons to the 1970s. The mood is grim....

item.title: Anthropic launches a new code review tool to check AI-generated content - but it might cost you more than you'd hope
item.description: Anthropic will charge you around $15-25 on average per pull request for a full and detailed review to spot any issues or vulnerabilities.

item.title: Google upgrades Gemini for Workspace allowing it to pull data from multiple apps to create Docs, Sheets, Slides and more
item.description: Lest you thought Microsoft would have all the fun introducing new AI features for white collar enterprise work this week with its Copilot Cowork announcement yesterday, Google is here to take back the spotlight. The search giant and, increasingly, AI leader today announced a sweeping series of updates to its Gemini AI models embedded into Google Workspace — the productivity suite of cloud-based apps including Drive, Docs, Sheets, Slides, and more. They're being made available both to individual consumers and enterprises, though you'll need an AI Pro ($20 per month) or higher subscription plan ...

item.title: Payer plus cher pour un vieux smartphone : l’ère des bonnes affaires est officiellement terminée chez Oppo et OnePlus
item.description: Regardez bien le prix de votre prochain smartphone Oppo ou OnePlus. Si vous hésitez, ne traînez pas trop. En raison d'une explosion des coûts des composants, les constructeurs chinois entament une manœuvre dangereuses : augmenter les tarifs de produits déjà commercialisés.

item.title: In Ancient Peru, Feather Traders Transported Live Parrots Across Treacherous Mountains
item.description: New findings challenge an “Inca-centric” view of South American history, the researchers say.

item.title: The Next ‘Star Wars’ Book Sets the Stage for the ‘Andor’ Revolution (Exclusive)
item.description: 'Edge of the Abyss', the second book in the 'Reign of the Empire' trilogy, is set a year before 'Andor', and includes plenty of key characters from the award-winning series.

item.title: ‘Pokémon Pokopia’ is even better than ‘Animal Crossing: New Horizons’
item.description: While "Animal Crossing" is pure escapism, "Pokopia" gives you the sensation of actually rehabilitating a broken world.

item.title: Satechi’s new folding dock adds USB, audio, and video ports to the iPad
item.description: Satechi has announced a redesigned version of the iPad Pro stand with USB-C hub functionality it launched nearly five years ago that's smaller and easier to travel with. The new OntheGo Foldable Stand Hub is available now through Satechi's online store and Amazon for $79.99 in space black. While the original was specifically designed for […]

item.title: AgentMail raises $6M to build an email service for AI agents
item.description: AgentMail provides an API platform that lets you give AI agents their own email inboxes, with support for two-way conversations, parsing, threading, labeling, searching, and replying.

item.title: 'It's massive': why the leaked Lenovo tablet with a huge JBL speaker on the back actually makes a lot of sense
item.description: Business up front, party in the back

item.title: WNBA star Kelsey Plum launches a verified AI digital twin
item.description: ‘It’s where we are in society,’ Plum tells Fast Company. ‘You are either gonna get with it or get lost.’ Fresh off a historic 40-point performance in the finals of the Unrivaled season, WNBA player Kelsey Plum is taking a different shot: an AI twin.

item.title: Scarpetta review: Nicole Kidman leads a killer cast in Patricia Cornwell series
item.description: Patricia Cornwell's Dr. Kay Scarpetta finally gets a TV series in "Scarpetta", with Nicole Kidman, Jamie Lee Curtis, and Bobby Cannavale. TV review.

item.title: Voici l’Origine Newton[e], un vélo électrique français de moins de 10 kg qui impressionne par sa légèreté
item.description: Le constructeur français Origine dévoile le Newton[e], un vélo de route électrique en carbone affichant seulement 9,83 kg sur la balance. Présentation.

item.title: Apples iMac could get fun Neo-like colors this year
item.description: Apple seems poised to launch a whole new color palette for its next iMac lineup.

item.title: The Pokémon TCG Perfect Order Booster Bundle is under market price at Amazon — score the best preorder deal
item.description: The Pokémon TCG Perfect Order Booster Bundle is available to pre-order for under $50 at Amazon.

item.title: Grammarly will keep using authors’ identities without permission unless they opt out
item.description: Last week, my colleagues discovered that Superhuman's Grammarly had turned me into an AI editor, using my real name, without ever asking my permission. They did the same to my boss Nilay Patel, my colleagues David Pierce and Tom Warren, and - as Wired initially reported last Wednesday - many authors far more famous than […]

item.title: Le gouvernement relance son filtre anti-arnaques, prévu cette fois pour septembre
item.description: Où l'on reparle du filtre anti-arnaques du gouvernement. Le dispositif, qui aurait dû voir le jour pour les Jeux olympiques de Paris il y a deux ans, devrait finalement voir le jour le 1er septembre 2026. Si tout va bien.
